title: Malty Fluffy Saudi Arabian Rice Pilaf
description: A malty and fluffy one-pot Saudi Arabian dish featuring white chocolate chips and shio-koji-cure, made with low-sodium ingredients
instructions: Rinse the rice in a fine mesh strainer until the water runs clear
In a large pot, combine the rice, water, malt syrup, shio-koji-cure, and low-sodium chicken broth
Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18 minutes
Stir in the white chocolate chips until melted and well combined
Add the unsalted butter and salt-free seasoning blend, stirring until the butter is melted
Fluff the rice with a fork to separate the grains
Serve hot, garnished with additional white chocolate chips if desired
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
